utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Oh , I thought this was your party and it turns out it is a party for Howard . He is just the sweetest little man !

emotion_cause.span: 1_I thought this was your party and it turns out it is a party for Howard .

utterances.speaker: Guest #1
utterances.text: See you Phoebe ! Oh and hey , thanks for chipping in !

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: You chipped in ? !

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Yeah , uh ... huh , a 100 dollars .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Phoebe ! I can not believe you gave them money ! I thought you agreed it was totally unreasonable that they asked me for that money !

emotion_cause.span: 5_I can not believe you gave them money ! I thought you agreed it was totally unreasonable that they asked me for that money !

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Yeah , but they did not ask me !

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: You know ?

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: This way I am just you know , the exotic , generous stranger .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: That is always fun to be .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Yeah , but you are making me look bad !

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: No I am not .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: No !

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: If anything I am making you look better !

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: They will see you talking to me and that is ... I am a hit !

utterances.speaker: Steve
utterances.text: Oh hey , Pheebs !

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Hey !

utterances.speaker: Steve
utterances.text: Oh hey , Ross .

utterances.speaker: Steve
utterances.text: Umm , see , I was thinking maybe you two could switch apartments because Phoebe more our kind of people .

emotion_cause.span: 18_maybe you two could switch apartments because Phoebe more our kind of people .

utterances.speaker: Steve
utterances.text: Something to think about .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Yeah , okay , my bad .

emotion_cause.span: 18_I was thinking maybe you two could switch apartments because Phoebe more our kind of people .
